assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1 (Run 3): Lab Turnaround

AUC-TD is single time point — C-index is correct primary for survival model. Fixed LR baseline vs. tuned Cox = tuning confound. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2 (Run 3): Lab Turnaround

Both issues documented explicitly in the design text. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3 (Run 3): Lab Turnaround

Cox model tuned extensively; LR baseline is not — this asymmetry undermines the comparison's interpretability. AUC-TD at 7 days misses survival model's full-trajectory advantage. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: ## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 3): Unanimous critique_wins. Verdict: critique_wins
